file_insights.purpose: Enables atomic file operations via temp + rename pattern
file_insights.impact: Minimal; single new dependency for stdlib file safety

file_insights.key_change: Replaced fs::write() with tempfile::Builder + persist() pattern
file_insights.purpose: Ensure metadata writes are atomic; prevents corruption on partial writes or crashes
file_insights.error_handling: Added context() annotations for temp file creation and persistence steps

patterns_discovered.implementation: Create temp file in same directory → write payload → persist (atomic rename)
patterns_discovered.key_detail: Temp file in same directory guarantees atomic rename on same filesystem

patterns_discovered.details: Each step (parent check, temp creation, write, persist) has descriptive error context
patterns_discovered.benefit: Debugging clarity on which phase failed

patterns_discovered.details: Parent directory resolution ensures temp file stays on same filesystem as target
patterns_discovered.reason: Rename(2) syscall atomicity requires same filesystem

gotchas_discovered.issue: If temp file created in /tmp and target in /home, atomic rename fails (cross-filesystem)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Used target.parent() to place temp file in same directory as target

gotchas_discovered.issue: meta_path(card_dir) might have no parent (edge case)
Manual rename leaves orphaned temp files on error
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Used tempfile::persist() which handles cleanup via Drop trait

approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Replaced synchronous fs::write with atomic temp+rename via tempfile crate
approach_outcome.verification: Single commit landed; no test failures reported
approach_outcome.deployment_readiness: Complete; atomic pattern now protects metadata against corruption

recommendations.recommendation: Apply atomic write pattern to other metadata-bearing operations in dispatcher
recommendations.rationale: Meta corruption is a silent failure vector; same pattern should protect all critical state writes

recommendations.recommendation: Extract into reusable helper function: write_atomic_json(path, value)
recommendations.rationale: Reduces duplication if pattern spreads; centralizes atomic semantics

recommendations.recommendation: Document temp file naming convention in code comment
recommendations.rationale: Facilitates debugging if temp files accumulate (e.g., due to early exit)

recommendations.recommendation: Monitor tempfile crate for updates; currently v3 is stable
recommendations.rationale: Dependency maintenance; no immediate action needed
